prakriti 0.1.0

Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

prakriti 0.1.0

Initial release.

  • 30 palettes covering sequential, diverging, and qualitative types, inspired by India’s natural landscapes.
  • prakriti_palette() for raw hex vectors with discrete or continuous output.
  • scale_color_prakriti() / scale_colour_prakriti() / scale_fill_prakriti() for ggplot2.
  • display_prakriti() for base-graphics palette inspection.
  • prakriti_names(), prakriti_info() for discovery.

Developed by Arijit Ghosh.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
